title: Paladin Revamp
changed: Judgement Blade, Grand Cross and Divine Punishment now trigger hit effects (and sacrifice)
Judgement Blade: Cooldown 3s → 1s, Damage 77% → 100%, now Blinds
Divine Punishment: Duration 1.5s → 5s, Cast Time 1s → 0.3s per level, Damage 150% → 77%, now Slows
fixed: Removed AA aftercast delay from Summons (broken after previous patch)
